title: Mossel Bay talent releases single
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A versatile artist with a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A versatile artist with a love of all genres of music, KwaNonqaba musician Mof-cando recently released the very first single off his six-track EP entitled Shibobo.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A versatile artist with a love of all genres of music, KwaNonqaba musician Mof-cando recently released the very first single off his six-track EP entitled Shibobo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While the album's name references the South African term for a soccer manoeuvre, Mof-cando's music is inspired by love, life and making a difference in people's lives. The first single to drop, which is currently available on Spotify, is a love song called \"Impilo Emnandi\", which means 'nice life' in isiXhosa.","html":"While the album's name references the South African term for a soccer manoeuvre, Mof-cando's music is inspired by love, life and making a difference in people's lives. The first single to drop, which is currently available on Spotify, is a love song called \"Impilo Emnandi\", which means 'nice life' in isiXhosa."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I am singing to a woman and promising her that if she sticks with me, I will show her a nice life,\" said Mof-cando."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It is more of an R & B genre, but the rest of the tracks on the EP are extremely versatile. There will be amapiano, trap, hip-hop, Afro and three-step sounds on it. The next single will be launched before the end of November and the rest of the EP will be released in January,\" he said.","html":"\"It is more of an R & B genre, but the rest of the tracks on the EP are extremely versatile. There will be amapiano, trap, hip-hop, Afro and three-step sounds on it. The next single will be launched before the end of November and the rest of the EP will be released in January,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mof-cando said he was born and raised loving music in Botshabelo, a large township east of Bloemfontein.","html":"Mof-cando said he was born and raised loving music in Botshabelo, a large township east of Bloemfontein."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He first discovered he could sing when he was in Grade One and his teacher told his noisy class to be quiet or sing, and so, Mof-cando began to do just that. His teacher was amazed, and soon he became known among his primary school peers for his voice.","html":"He first discovered he could sing when he was in Grade One and his teacher told his noisy class to be quiet or sing, and so, Mof-cando began to do just that. His teacher was amazed, and soon he became known among his primary school peers for his voice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mof-cando in KwaNonqaba. Photo: Chelsea Pieterse","html":"Mof-cando in KwaNonqaba. Photo: Chelsea Pieterse"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"From there, he joined his grandmother's church choir, performing clap and tap music, a South African genre of music characterised by hand clapping, foot tapping and the combining of traditional African rhythm with gospel music."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At age 12, he began writing his own lyrics for gospel songs in seSotho and isiXhosa, and at age 15, he became the choirmaster of the church choir.","html":"At age 12, he began writing his own lyrics for gospel songs in seSotho and isiXhosa, and at age 15, he became the choirmaster of the church choir."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said he grew up listening to all genres of music. \"If it sounded good to me, I would celebrate that song by listening to it at least 10 times.","html":"He said he grew up listening to all genres of music. \"If it sounded good to me, I would celebrate that song by listening to it at least 10 times."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I even had a few Afrikaans CDs. I didn't understand the lyrics, but the rhythm of some songs moved me,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mof-cando said his all-time favourite South African artist is Bonginkosi Dlamini, professionally known as Zola 7.","html":"Mof-cando said his all-time favourite South African artist is Bonginkosi Dlamini, professionally known as Zola 7."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following his matriculation, looking for work in the Free State was tough.","html":"Following his matriculation, looking for work in the Free State was tough."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"That was when a friend of his called him and told him to come to Mossel Bay. He did and started working as a waiter at a local restaurant, all the while working on his music and teaching local church choirs the art of clap and tap as he had learnt it in Botshabelo.","html":"That was when a friend of his called him and told him to come to Mossel Bay. He did and started working as a waiter at a local restaurant, all the while working on his music and teaching local church choirs the art of clap and tap as he had learnt it in Botshabelo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A church choir in Cape Town invited him to visit them, and he ended up living there for six years before heading back to Mossel Bay in 2012.","html":"A church choir in Cape Town invited him to visit them, and he ended up living there for six years before heading back to Mossel Bay in 2012."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"When I came back, a few of my friends had their own studios. I told one of them I wanted to record and in 2018, I released my first single entitled \"Vuka\", which has an Afrotrap sound,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In 2020, when lockdown hit the country, work in the studio suffered. And when it was lifted, he began taking his music seriously again.","html":"In 2020, when lockdown hit the country, work in the studio suffered. And when it was lifted, he began taking his music seriously again."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I write all my own songs. My music is influenced by helpful messages, something inspirational that could change someone's life, what we see and do every day, all over various beats. I don't have a specific genre of music I fit into,\" he said.","html":"\"I write all my own songs. My music is influenced by helpful messages, something inspirational that could change someone's life, what we see and do every day, all over various beats. I don't have a specific genre of music I fit into,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Find Mof-cando on Spotify, Facebook, YouTube, Instagram and X, all through searching 'Mof-cando'.","html":"Find Mof-cando on Spotify, Facebook, YouTube, Instagram and X, all through searching 'Mof-cando'."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
